text: How to order: Browse and choose products by category or car brand. Check compatibility with your vehicle model.
answer: 1. Browse & choose – Explore our products by category or car brand. Check compatibility with your vehicle model.

text: How to order: Contact us via WhatsApp, phone, or contact form. Share product name, quantity, and car model.
answer: 2. Contact us – Reach out via WhatsApp, phone, or the contact form. Share the product name, quantity, and your car model if relevant.

text: How to order: We confirm availability, price, and delivery. Payment details shared after order confirmation.
answer: 3. Confirm – We'll confirm availability, price, and delivery options. Payment details will be shared once the order is confirmed.

text: PPF filming installation: We can arrange installation at our Pune location. Ask us for details.
answer: 4. Installation (optional) – For PPF, filming, and similar services, we can arrange installation at our Pune location. Ask us for details.

text: Delivery Pune: We deliver in Pune and surrounding areas. Delivery charges may apply based on distance.
answer: Pune & nearby – We deliver in Pune and surrounding areas. Delivery charges may apply based on distance.

text: Delivery all over India: We provide delivery all over India via courier. Order from anywhere.
answer: All over India – We provide delivery all over India via courier. Shipping cost depends on product size, weight, and destination.

text: Collaboration: We are open for collaboration to keep your products in stock for sale. Manufacturers and distributors can reach out.
answer: We are open for collaboration to keep your products in stock for sale. If you manufacture or distribute car accessories and want to reach more customers, reach out to discuss stocking arrangements.

text: Car services references: We provide references for insurance, garages, manufacturers, and other car-related services.
answer: We provide references for all car-related services – insurance, garages, manufacturers, and more. Need a trusted mechanic, insurance agent, or service centre? Ask us for recommendations.

text: Pickup: Collect orders from our store at Near Bhandari Petrol Pump, Mumbai-Pune Road, Kasarwadi, Pune.
answer: Pickup – You can collect orders from our store at Near Bhandari Petrol Pump, Mumbai-Pune Road, Kasarwadi, Pune.

text: Delivery timeline: In-stock items dispatched within 1–3 business days. Installation services scheduled separately.
answer: Timeline – In-stock items are usually dispatched within 1–3 business days. Installation services are scheduled separately.

text: Payment methods: Cash on delivery COD, UPI, bank transfer, card payment at store.
answer: Accepted methods – Cash on delivery (COD), UPI, bank transfer, and card payment at our store.

text: Advance payment: For shipped orders we may request partial or full advance. Details shared at order time.
answer: Advance payment – For shipped orders, we may request partial or full advance payment. Details will be shared at the time of order.

text: COD cash on delivery: Available for select areas. Full payment collected at delivery.
answer: COD – Available for select areas. Full payment is collected at the time of delivery.

text: Defective products: Contact within 24–48 hours of delivery. We arrange replacement or refund.
answer: Defective products – If you receive a defective or damaged item, contact us within 24–48 hours of delivery. We will arrange a replacement or refund as applicable.

text: Wrong item: Inform us immediately. We correct the order at no extra cost.
answer: Wrong item – If you receive the wrong product, inform us immediately. We will correct the order at no extra cost.

text: Change of mind return: Unopened unused items may be returned within 7 days. Restocking fee may apply.
answer: Change of mind – Unopened, unused items may be returned within 7 days of delivery, subject to inspection. A restocking fee may apply.

text: Refund timeline: Refunds processed within 5–7 business days after approval. Credited to original payment method.
answer: Refund timeline – Refunds are processed within 5–7 business days after approval. The amount will be credited to the original payment method.

text: Product warranty: Many products have manufacturer warranty. We share warranty details at purchase.
answer: Product warranty – Many products come with manufacturer warranty. We will share warranty details at the time of purchase.

text: PPF filming warranty: We stand behind our installation work. Ask about warranty for PPF and filming.
answer: PPF & filming – We stand behind our installation work. Ask us about warranty coverage for PPF and filming services.

text: Support: Reach us on WhatsApp or phone. We help with product selection, installation, after-sales support.
answer: Support – For any queries, reach us on WhatsApp or phone. We're happy to help with product selection, installation, or after-sales support.

text: Welcome Car Decor: Your dealer for car exterior decor and accessories – filming, chargers, headlights, speakers and more.
answer: Welcome Car Decor is your trusted dealer for car exterior decor and accessories. From filming and chargers to headlights and speakers, we help you personalize and enhance your vehicle with quality products.

text: Contact: WhatsApp 918888770071, phone 8888770071. Address Near Bhandari Petrol Pump, Mumbai-Pune Road, Kasarwadi, Pune.
answer: Reach us: WhatsApp +91 8888770071, Phone +91 8888770071. Visit us at Near Bhandari Petrol Pump, Mumbai-Pune Road, Kasarwadi, Pune-411034.
